primary_field: Knight landed session reports — commit provenance, tags, and session summaries

adjacents.field: predecessor gate chains and session sequencing

provenance: Seeded K461/B121 from all REPORT_KNIGHT_*.md files in BISHOP_DROPZONE/03_BishopHandoffs/. Courier auto-appends new reports on every rebuild.

observation: K436 — Cathedral Tools. Commit: 6c47d9b. Tag: v-cathedral-tools-K436. Session B117. Landed the four MCP tools (log_tidbit, fates_route, scribe_log, consult_scribes) at librarian-mcp/src/scribes/. 23/23 tests green. p95 consult latency 1.6ms vs 200ms target.

K438a — Member Cathedral Phase AB. Tag: v-member-cathedral-K438a. Commit: 45b1481. Session B117. Phase A: cathedral schema (5 tables, RLS, append-only invariants, auto-provisioning trigger, starter-pack seeder). Phase B: 6 React routes under platform/src/pages/cathedral/.

K438b — Member Cathedral Phase CDEF. Tag: v-member-cathedral-K438b. Session B117. Predecessor: K438a @ 45b1481. Extends (not modifies) the cathedral schema. Supersedes the retired v-member-cathedral-K438 tag.

K444 — R11 Cross-Vendor Memory Benchmark. Tags: v-r11-bank-sealed-K444, v-r11-cross-vendor-K444. Session B119. 10 conditions, 497 calls across all vendors. Anthropic prompt caching creates massive structural cost advantage. Dispatch ref: PROMPT_KNIGHT_K444_B118_PRESTAGE_R11_CROSS_VENDOR_MEMORY_BENCHMARK.md. Anchors K444 commit as patent priority date for #2278 benchmarks.
K447 — Supabase pgTAP CI. Tag: v-cathedral-rls-ci-K447. Session B118. Predecessor: K438b @ 3b1ac6c, tag v-member-cathedral-K438b. Delivered RLS/pgTAP CI integration.

K448 — MCP Build Gate. Tag: v-mcp-build-gate-K448. Session B118. Predecessor: K447 @ fba9f87, tag v-cathedral-rls-ci-K447. Delivered build-guard wrapper preventing concurrent tool-call hang during MCP rebuild cycle.
K449 — MCP Supervisor. Tag: v-mcp-supervisor-K449. Session B118. Predecessor: K448 @ e8fe2d6, tag v-mcp-build-gate-K448. Delivered supervisor process management for librarian-mcp server.

K450 — CI Validation and BRIDLE v10. Tags: v-k447-ci-validated-K450a (Part A), v-bridle-v10-K450b (Part B). Session B118. Predecessor: K449 @ 441d531, tag v-mcp-supervisor-K449. Finding: K447-K449 commits had never been pushed to origin/main; last pushed was 06f83c1 (K443). BRIDLE rule 10 (MCP tooling discipline) added.
K451 — Baseline Migration. Tag: v-migration-baseline-K451. Commit: eec98a7. Session B119. Delivered migration baseline including medallion_eligibility INSERT from commit 9938d1c.
K452 — Session Gap Diagnostic (B119 orphan dispatched B121). Tag: v-session-gap-diagnostic-K452. Commit: 0f9cbf9. Session B119/B121. Diagnosed and remediated sessions.json gap detection logic.

K453 — Session Closeout Hook. Tag: v-bishop-closeout-K453. Session B120. Delivered atomic Bishop session closeout scripts. Scripts do NOT modify milestone file, do NOT commit, do NOT auto-detect session end — Bishop calls explicitly.

K454 — Mini Wildfire Tour (B119 orphan dispatched B121). Tag: v-mini-wildfire-tour-K454. Commit: e7ba71010387055822e9d2d85fb531d5cbfe4186. Session B119/B121. MiniWildfireTour component + /mini-tour route. WildFire Tour mode gating: mock data ONLY shown when tour mode is active, not in Real Data default state.

K456 — Canonical Discipline Chain. Commit: 6230408. No tag (tag not requested per K456 scope). Session B121. canonical_values.yaml as single source of truth; npm run rebuild auto-codegens hook + verify:canonical; Pawn dispatch gate added.

K458 — Meter Reader MVP (B119 orphan dispatched B121). Tag: v-meter-reader-k458-mvp. Session B119/B121. Delivered platform/supabase/functions/_shared/plug_adapters/ stubs for twitter, facebook, instagram, linkedin, reddit, discord, email. Instagram gated on Meta app review (K458c).

K459 — K999 Ghost Anchor Delete. Tag: v-ghost-anchor-k999-delete-K459. Commit: 57ec495. Session B121. Deleted K999 ghost anchor from sessions.json (gitignored — report-only commit). npm run rebuild:full all 13 stages passed.

K460 — update_session Input Guard + Session-Counter Codegen. Tag: v-update-session-input-guard-K460. Commits: 04f0a50 + 8153640 (two commits). Session B121. Delivered plausibility guard at update_session write path: IDs >9999 hard-rejected; IDs exceeding prefix max by >200 rejected; TEST_ escape hatch. K462 dependency resolved.

K462 — Session-Count Semantics: artifact-derived UI, MCP-logged diagnostic. Tag: v-session-count-semantics-K462. Commit: f2154d2. Session B121. Delivered four overview.json fields: knightSessionsMcpLogged (137), bishopSessionsMcpLogged (54), knightPromptCount (54, UI-facing), bishopSessionCount (52, UI-facing). This is the predecessor gate for K461.

K461 — Knight Cathedral Instantiation (this session). Phase 2 of multi-Cathedral dogfood. Creates librarian-mcp/stitchpunks/knight_cathedral/ with 4 seed Scribes (KnightQueue, KnightHandoffs, KnightBRIDLEMemory, KnightArchitecture). Extends SP-7 Courier for auto-population. Makes KNIGHT_QUEUE.md a derived view. Target tag: v-knight-cathedral-instantiation-K461.
